description: A candid color event photograph (no on-image text, seals, or graphic overlay) taken in the White House Rose Garden at dusk. President Trump, in a dark suit with a purple/blue tie, stands on the colonnade walkway gesturing/pointing toward seated guests; to the left a man in a suit applauds beside white-clothed dinner tables, and at right a man in a dark suit stands by the hedges. Manicured boxwood hedges, a patio heater, the West Wing colonnade with white columns, and green trees frame the scene. This is part of a National Police Week dinner ('BACK THE BLUE') tweet honoring law enforcement.
